recommendations.title: Night Moves
recommendations.overview: The story about three radical environmentalists coming together to execute the most intense protest of their lives: the explosion of a hydroelectric dam.

recommendations.title: Wendy and Lucy
recommendations.overview: A near-penniless drifter's journey to Alaska in search of work is interrupted when she loses her dog while attempting to shoplift food for it.

recommendations.title: Meek's Cutoff
recommendations.overview: A group of settlers traveling through the Oregon High Desert in 1845 find themselves stranded in harsh conditions.

recommendations.title: The Mastermind
recommendations.overview: In a sedate Massachusetts suburb circa 1970, unemployed family man and amateur art thief J.B. Mooney sets out on his first heist. With the museum cased and accomplices recruited, he has an airtight plan. Or so he thinks.

recommendations.title: First Cow
recommendations.overview: In the 1820s, a taciturn loner and skilled cook travels west to Oregon Territory, where he meets a Chinese immigrant also seeking his fortune. Soon the two team up on a dangerous scheme to steal milk from the wealthy landowner’s prized Jersey cow—the

recommendations.title: Old Joy
recommendations.overview: Soon to be a father, Mark feels the pressure of domestic responsibility closing in, so he is more than happy to accept when his old friend Kurt proposes a camping trip in the Oregon wilderness. During their time together, the men come to grips with t

recommendations.title: Certain Women
recommendations.overview: Three strong-willed women strive to forge their own paths amidst the wide-open plains of the American Northwest: a lawyer forced to subdue a troubled client; a wife and mother whose plans to construct her dream home reveal fissures in her marriage; a

recommendations.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
recommendations.overview: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as he's poised to begin a life-changing professional career.

recommendations.title: The Worst Person in the World
recommendations.overview: The chronicles of four years in the life of Julie, a young woman who navigates the troubled waters of her love life and struggles to find her career path, leading her to take a realistic look at who she really is.

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.
